allow: Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.merchant.findMany\(\).then\(m => { console.log\('\\''Merchants:'\\'', m.length\); m.forEach\(x => console.log\('\\'' -'\\'', x.name, '\\''|'\\'', x.primaryCategory\)\); }\).then\(\(\) => p.cardCategoryRule.findMany\({ distinct: ['\\''category'\\''] }\)\).then\(r => { console.log\('\\''Categories:'\\'', r.map\(x => x.category\)\); }\).finally\(\(\) => p.$disconnect\(\)\)')
